visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand in a gray-floored parking garage. The woman on the right wears a white sleeveless dress and a dark blue beret, holding a small membership card near her face with a wide smile. The woman on the left wears a black cutout top and stands behind a metal shopping cart filled with light blue plastic bins and cardboard boxes. A large red and blue 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is static at the top of the frame throughout the scene. (2) A close-up shot focuses on a small, rectangular card held tightly by a hand. The card features the 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo and red text specifying 'BUSINESS MEMBER'. The background is blurred, showing the industrial ceiling and fluorescent lighting of the parking facility. (3) A staff member wearing a red uniform vest holds a large stack of these mini membership cards in their hands. The cards are arranged in a fan-like pattern, making the logo visible on several of them simultaneously. In the background, red and black signage indicates the store entrance and parking areas. (4) The camera returns to the two women. The woman in the beret points to the card and then makes a 'mini' gesture with her thumb and forefinger. The woman in the black top smiles broadly and gives a thumbs-up to the camera. Background shoppers are visible moving on an escalator in the distance. Vibrant yellow and white text overlays with black outlines appear at the bottom of the screen.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 這是我的會員卡. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Subtitle]: 這是超迷你會員卡. [Variety]: 超迷你會員卡. (3) [Subtitle]: 現在迷你會員卡又可以領了喔. (4) [Subtitle]: 而且這次不一樣是商業會員的. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE BUSINESS MEMBER. (5) [Subtitle]: 是不同的款式. (6) [Subtitle]: 大家只要找藍色衣服的工作人員拿取. (7) [Subtitle]: 就可以免費領取了喔. [Variety]: 就可以免費領取. (8) [Subtitle]: 數量有限趕快來拿. (9) [Subtitle]: 你要做的事情只有按讚他們粉絲專頁. (10) [Subtitle]: 超簡單的. (11) [Subtitle]: 帶回去吧. (12) [Subtitle]: 下次會不會出黑色的. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE EXECUTIVE MEMBER. (13) [Subtitle]: 很期待欸黑鑽卡. (14) [Subtitle]: 可能黑卡只有黑卡會員能拿. (15) [Subtitle]: 哇. [Variety]: 真的很可愛.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 staff member (hands/torso), and approximately 3 distant passers-by in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair and wears a white textured lace dress with a blue beret. The second woman has shoulder-length black hair and wears a black top with a cutout detail on the chest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary setting is a Costco parking garage with concrete floors, fluorescent lights, and metal pillars. In the background, there are escalators and store entrance signage. One shot features a staff member's red vest.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice speaks rapidly, introducing membership cards. The tone is cheerful and high-arousal. An upbeat electronic pop BGM with a steady 4/4 dance beat and bright synth chords plays consistently in the background. The vocal clarity is very high, dominating the mix. (2) The same female voice continues with an informative narrative, explaining the 'business member' aspect. The music maintains its constant energy and tempo. There is a very subtle pop-like sound effect during a visual transition. The acoustic environment is clean with minimal room resonance. (3) Two female voices engage in a short, expressive dialogue. One voice uses a rising intonation to ask a speculative question about other card colors. The second voice reacts with a loud, surprised 'Wow' exclamation. The upbeat music continues until the very end, fading slightly after the final vocalization.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Informative Evidence -> Call-to-Action -> Speculative Discussion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional announcement informing Costco members and potential customers about a special offer for a free 'mini business membership card'. It uses energetic hosts and bright visuals to attract attention and provides clear instructions on how to obtain the item by interacting with their social media page.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names 'Costco', shows their trademarked logo multiple times, displays their physical membership cards, and provides a direct call-to-action for a promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video is a typical social media promotional clip characterized by high energy, frequent subtitles, and a focus on 'free' perks to drive engagement.
